beforeAddLiquidity(address,(address,addr.details: hookData encoding for issuer's first LP:      abi.encode(issuer, token, lockDuration, vestingDuration, commitment, triggerConfig)

afterSwap(address,(address,address,uint2.notice: Called after a swap. Deposits insurance fee on buys and         reports issuer sales to TriggerOracle.

beforeAddLiquidity(address,(address,addr.notice: Called before liquidity is added. First LP provider becomes the issuer         and their LP is registered in EscrowVault.

beforeRemoveLiquidity(address,(address,a.notice: Called before liquidity is removed. Enforces vesting for issuer's LP.         Non-issuer LP is completely free — no restrictions.         Force removal via trigger bypasses all vesting checks.

beforeSwap(address,(address,address,uint.notice: Called before a swap. Snapshots issuer balance for router bypass detection (RISK-3).         Uses EIP-1153 transient storage to pass data to afterSwap within the same tx.

defaultLockDuration().notice: Default lock duration when hookData doesn't specify custom (default 7 days)

defaultVestingDuration().notice: Default vesting duration when hookData doesn't specify custom (default 83 days)

forceRemoveIssuerLP(bytes32).notice: Force-removes issuer's remaining LP from the pool and sends assets to InsurancePool.

getHookPermissions().notice: Returns the hook permission flags for Uniswap V4.

getPoolCommitment(bytes32).notice: Returns the immutable PoolCommitment for a pool.

getPoolIssuer(bytes32).notice: Returns the issuer address for a pool.

isCommitmentStricterThanDefault(bytes32).notice: Returns true if ANY commitment dimension is stricter than governance defaults.

isIssuer(bytes32,address).notice: Check if an address is the issuer for a pool.

maxPoolTVL().notice: Maximum total liquidity per pool (0 = unlimited)

minLockDuration().notice: Minimum lock duration issuer can set (default 7 days)

minVestingDuration().notice: Minimum vesting duration issuer can set (default 7 days)

setBastionRouter(address).notice: Set the BastionRouter address. One-time setter (router deployed after hook).

setDefaultLockDuration(uint40).notice: Set the default lock duration (1–90 days).

setDefaultVestingDuration(uint40).notice: Set the default vesting duration (7–365 days).

setMaxPoolTVL(uint256).notice: Set the maximum pool TVL (0 = unlimited, max 1000 ether).

setMinLockDuration(uint40).notice: Set the minimum lock duration (1–30 days).

setMinVestingDuration(uint40).notice: Set the minimum vesting duration (1–30 days).

syncFeeRate().notice: Sync cached fee rate from InsurancePool. Call after governance changes.

transferGovernance(address).notice: Transfer governance to a new address.
